dialogue_texts: Reimu
The air in these woods is just as heavy as that shrine maiden warned me.
Reimu
It feels stagnant, like the trees themselves are holding their breath.
Oh, hello there! Isn't the golden canopy just spectacular?
It’s finally time for the transformation!
Reimu
A fairy? You don't look like you're suffering from that "glohm" curse.
Reimu
If anything, you're a bit too energetic for this gloom.
Glohm? I don't know about any about that!
Helene
Anyway, I'm Helene Black, and I'm here to announce that autumn has officially arrived, eh?
Reimu
Listen up, Herald of Autumn.
Reimu
I'm the Chief Justice of the Federal Kingdom of Gensokyo Supreme Court, and I'm on urgent business.
Reimu
I need to get to the mansion near Yumemura, so please move aside.
Helene
Not yet. You can't just rush through the harvest festival's invitation.
Helene
You need to appreciate the golden leaves first!
Reimu
Sorry, but I don't have time for a nature walk. If you still won't move, I'll have to clear the path myself!
Helene
Then let's see if you can handle the magic of the falling leaves!
